title: . Forms of payment. No employer shall pay the wages of an employee by means of promissory
content:
. Forms of payment. No employer shall pay the wages of an employee by means of promissory 
notes, vouchers, coupons, tokens, tickets, chits, or any object other than legal tender, even when expressly 
requested by the employee. 
Payment of wages by check or money order shall be allowed when such manner of payment is customary on 
the date of effectivity of this Code, or is necessary because of special circumstances as specified in 
appropriate regulations to be issued by the Secretary of Labor and Employment or as stipulated in a collective 
bargaining agreement.
